nasb.text: He will also shatter the obelisks of Heliopolis, which is in the land of Egypt; and the temples of the gods of Egypt he will burn with fire.” ’ ”

esv.text: He shall break the obelisks of Heliopolis, which is in the land of Egypt, and the temples of the gods of Egypt he shall burn with fire.’”

cnv.text: 他必打碎埃及地伯．示麥的神柱，放火燒毀埃及神廟。’”

ccb.text: 他要摧毁埃及太阳神庙的神柱，烧毁埃及的神庙。’”
